title: RAGAS Observability Console
summary: Build a polished evaluation control surface for groundedness, answer quality, and retrieval performance with report-ready summaries.

sample_features.query: Summarize the highest priority risk and recommended next step.

knowledge_base: RAGAS Observability Console is positioned as a LLM Evaluation starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Build a polished evaluation control surface for groundedness, answer quality, and retrieval performance with report-ready summaries.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on ragas, evaluation, rag, llmops.
Source paper: RAGAs: Automated Evaluation of Retrieval Augmented Generation

Production differentiation focus: Expose retrieval traces and grounding behavior through a product-style interface for llm evaluation.; Add production packaging, docs, health endpoints, and screenshots instead of stopping at a notebook or script.; Turn retrieval quality into something operators can tune and explain to non-ML stakeholders.
paper_title: RAGAs: Automated Evaluation of Retrieval Augmented Generation
